description: Vital Recorder is open with case 0003.vital loaded, showing a ~1-hour intraoperative recording from a noncardiac surgery (VitalDB open dataset, Seoul National University Hospital). This case includes ventilator and anesthetic agent monitoring: ECG leads (ECG_II, ECG_V5), pulse oximetry (PLETH), lung compliance (COMPLIANCE), inspired/expired sevoflurane concentrations (INSP_SEVO, EXP_SEVO), and airway pressures (PAMB_MBAR, MAWP_MBAR, PPLAT_MBAR). As an anesthesiologist reviewing this case for quality assurance, export the recording data to CSV format at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\case_0003_review.csv. Additionally, capture a screenshot of the display in Monitor mode, showing the numeric vital signs values, and save it to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\monitor_view_0003.png. Login: Desktop user (no login required).
